summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'Kies een monteur' feature and Admin security. All 22 backend tests passed. All 4 frontend tests passed. All requested features are working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 'Kies een monteur' features and Admin security features are working correctly. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_kies_monteur_admin_security.py. Admin endpoints are now properly secured with role-based authentication.

admin_link_navigation.logged_in_as_admin: PASS - Admin link 'Beheer' visible in navigation

booking_page_step2_ui.vakman_name: PASS - Name displayed (e.g., 'Test Vakman 102340', 'Jan de Vries')

booking_page_step2_ui.navigation_to_step3: PASS - Can proceed to Step 3 after selecting vakman
